updateNote: Day 12 LATE EVENING — Iran demands permanent no-attack guarantee + compensation + nuclear rights as ceasefire conditions (Bloomberg). FBI warns California of Iran drone threat to West Coast; Oscars security elevated. Spain permanently withdraws ambassador to Israel, denies US base access. Greece caps fuel/food prices 3 months. Lebanon death toll rises to 634 (91 children), 780K displaced. Oil closes Brent $91.98 (+4.76%), WTI $87.25 (+4.55%). Iran-Hezbollah joint 5-hour coordinated attack on Israel. V1.8 update.
